ddls:
CREATE TABLE "powders" (
  "powder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each powder type */,
  "powder_type" TEXT /* Description of the powder type */,
  "d50_microns" REAL /* D50 particle size in micrometers */,
  "green_density_pct" REAL /* Green density as a percentage */,
  "sintered_density_pct" REAL /* Sintered density as a percentage */,
  "sintering_temp_c" INTEGER /* Sintering temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "sintering_time_min" INTEGER /* Sintering time in minutes */,
  "composition" TEXT /* Detailed chemical composition of the powder */,
  "morphology" TEXT /* Morphology of the powder particles */,
  "application" TEXT /* Application of the powder */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the powder */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date of production */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number for traceability */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("powder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "powder_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property entry */,
  "powder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related powder */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., Chemical Composition, Morphology) */,
  "property_value" REAL /* Value of the property */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the property value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_powder_properties_powder_id FOREIGN KEY ("powder_id") REFERENCES powders ("powder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processing_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter entry */,
  "powder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related powder */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the processing parameter (e.g., Compaction Pressure, Heating Rate) */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the processing parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the parameter */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_processing_parameters_powder_id FOREIGN KEY ("powder_id") REFERENCES powders ("powder_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each powder type
Detailed chemical composition of the powder
Timestamp when the entry was created
Timestamp when the entry was last updated
Unique identifier for each property entry
Name of the property (e.g., Chemical Composition, Morphology)
Unit of measurement for the property value

Timestamp when the entry was last updated
